walkthroughSteps: Locate Shuanshuan in Shinshen Village after obtaining the "Tribute of Earth" main story item.
Speak with Shuanshuan to accept her first request: find her "Shining Crystal".
Travel to the Golden City, Sunken Temple area. The Shining Crystal can be found there.
Return the Shining Crystal to Shuanshuan in Shinshen Village.
Progress the main story until you obtain the "Tribute of Human" main story item, then return to Shuanshuan.
Speak with Shuanshuan to accept her second request: find her "Music Box".
Travel to the Reeds of Mourning, Reed Sea area. The Music Box can be found there.
Return the Music Box to Shuanshuan in Shinshen Village.
Progress the main story until you obtain the "Tribute of Heaven" main story item, then return to Shuanshuan.
Speak with Shuanshuan to accept her final request: find her "Lucky Charm".
Travel to the Nine Sol Sanctuary, Ancestral Hall area. The Lucky Charm can be found there.
Return the Lucky Charm to Shuanshuan in Shinshen Village and complete the final dialogue sequence to unlock the trophy.
prerequisites: Story progression up to obtaining the "Tribute of Earth", "Tribute of Human", and "Tribute of Heaven".
nine sols_gimme gimme.proTip: Always check back with Shuanshuan in Shinshen Village after collecting each of the three main story 'Tributes'. Her requests unlock sequentially with main story progression.

walkthroughSteps: Progress through the main storyline, defeating all required bosses.
Crucially, do NOT fully complete the Cleofás side quest (do not administer three Tears of Atonement).
Do NOT interact with Crisanta of the Wrapped Agony in the Convent of Our Lady of the Charred Visage to give her the 'Holy Wound of Abnegation'.
Defeat the final boss of the main game, His Holiness Escribar.
Ending B will play automatically after the boss fight.
prerequisites: Reach the final boss of the game.
blasphemous_the path of the unworthy.proTip: To guarantee Ending B, simply avoid starting or progressing the Cleofás side quest, and do not interact with Crisanta in the final area with any unique items. Ending B is the default 'good' ending if you avoid the specific requirements for Endings A and C.
blasphemous_the path of the unworthy.timeCommitment: Requires a full playthrough to reach the end.
